title: AutoFishing
description: A Minecraft 26.1.2 mod for auto-fishing based on Fabric.
body:
Auto-detect bobber splashes and auto-reel with precise timing.
  Press K to toggle on/off. Fully client-side.

  - Auto-reel at the right moment
  - Auto-cast after catching
  - K key toggle with action bar indicator
  - Works with any fishing rod
  - Supports English and Chinese
